description.value:
You can seize and move objects from afar using your gravitational field, although your control is clumsy, and you can't perform actions with these objects. You grasp one unattended object of light Bulk or less within 30 feet and move it slowly 15 feet in any direction, up to a maximum distance of 30 feet away from you. You can Sustain Gravity Grasp for up to 1 minute, moving the object an additional 15 feet each time. If the object is in the air when this effect ends, it falls.

Special If you're a black hole novian, dense novian, or massive novian, you can grasp one unattended object of 1 Bulk or less, rather than light Bulk or less.
